Commander '''Biros Baran''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rebel Alliance Intelligence Service]] agent who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was assigned to [[Eyrie Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Karatha]]. He was despised by many officers who served with him, earning the nickname "Barren-Brain" for his allegedly poorly-planned operations.

{{Char-stub}}
